u=1,#y,1 do local O=y[u]if t(O)=="string"then local t=C(O,1,1)if t=="6"then O=C(O,2)local k=L(O)local t={}local z=1 local V=0 local B=0 while z<=k do local u=C(O,z,z)local D=A[u]if D then u=0,4,1 do local v if u<D then local H=C(O,z+u,z+u)v=k[H]if not v then L=false break end else v=84 end y=y*85+v end if L then local u=n(y/16777216)%256 local C=n(y/65536)%256 local k=n(y/256)%256 return(function(k,D,u,n,y,t,H,B,f,z,r,T,O,X,A,V,P,v,e,L,Z,U)v,U,r,e,O,V,X,f,T,z,L,B,P,A,Z=function(v,k,t,D)local Vs={}local w,n7,d7,P7,Y,z,c,A7,K,e7,X,j7,ys,m,y,S7,N,o,Y7,B,R,Cs,j,b,Q7,M,W,ns,a,a7,k7,V,G7,u7,i,ks,L7,Q,M7,K7,V7,x7,p,i7,f7,B7,vs,J,D7,N7,C7,As,ts,J7,o7,F7,I7,I,X7,F,c7,S,r7,l,z7,R7,y7,q7,l7,Ds,q,us,h,h7,d,v7,x,p7,g7,E7,O7,Hs,U7,t7,H7,A,s7,zs,Ls,b7,Z7,g,s,T7,w7,m7,W7,E,Os,G )]]m7=Y7(N7,us)b7=x7[m7]Vs[C(3716)],Vs[C(4017)],Vs[C(3625)],Vs[C(3012)],x7=C(3533),C(2025),C(3412),C(1648),C(3336)>=C(1569)m7=L[t[C(2380)]]N7=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(3117)],Vs[C(2027)],Vs[C(4111)]=C(2571),C(1886),C(2443)us=N7(c7,J7)Vs[C(3636)],Vs[C(3180)],Vs[C(1374)]=C(3249),C(3547),C(3211)Y7=m7[us]Vs[C(3444)],Vs[C(2142)]=C(4262),C(3549)us=L[t[C(2380)]]m7=C(3632)<=C(1391)c7=L[t[C(3059)]]J7=c7(Cs,vs)Vs[C(2528)],Vs[C(1566)]=C(3615),C(2629)N7=us[J7]J7=L[t[C(2380)]]Cs=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(2188)],Vs[C(3824)],Vs[C(2570)]=C(2482),C(1651),C(2995)vs=Cs(Hs,ks)us=C(3433)~=C(2850)c7=J7[vs]vs=L[t[C(2380)]]Hs=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(3108)],Vs[C(4137)]=C(2766),C(2692)ks=Hs(ts,Ds)J7=C(3264)~=C(4075)Cs=vs[ks]ks=L[t[C(2380)]]vs,Vs[C(1790)]=C(3902)~=C(1800),C(2434)ts=L[t[C(3059)]]Ds=ts(ns,ys)Hs=ks[Ds]Vs[C(3133)]=C(1487)Ds=L[t[C(2380)]]Vs[C(2328)],Vs[C(4255)],ks,Vs[C(1439)],As,Vs[C(2633)]=C(2702),C(2979),C(1612)~=C(4032),C(3109),C(2830),C(2733)ns=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(3096)]=C(1353)ys=ns(Ls,As)Vs[C(3309)],Vs[C(2113)]=C(2787),C(3303)ts=Ds[ys]ys=L[t[C(2380)]]Ds,Vs[C(3880)],Vs[C(2572)]=C(3328)~=C(4192),C(4047),C(3540)Ls=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(2521)],Vs[C(2636)]=C(2668),C(3305)As=Ls(Os,zs)ns=ys[As]Vs[C(2954)]=C(3116)As=L[t[C(2380)]]Os=L[t[C(3059)]]zs=Os(Vs[C(2380)],Vs[C(3059)])Vs[C(3875)],Vs[C(4030)],Vs[C(3742)]=C(2467),C(1798),C(2927)Ls=As[zs]ys,Vs[C(3651)],Vs[C(4140)]=C(3499)>C(4161),C(4058),C(1673)zs=L[t[C(2380)]]As=C(3316)~=C(1918)Vs[C(2380)]=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(3059)]=Vs[C(2380)](Vs[C(2745)],Vs[C(3322)])Vs[C(3659)]=C(1828)Os=zs[Vs[C(3059)]]zs,Vs[C(2531)]=C(2804)<C(3347),C(2832)Vs[C(3059)]=L[t[C(2380)]]Vs[C(2745)]=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(4088)],Vs[C(2513)]=C(4182),C(2542)Vs[C(3322)]=Vs[C(2745)](Vs[C(2771)],Vs[C(3854)])Vs[C(2380)]=Vs[C(3059)][Vs[C(3322)]]Vs[C(2055)]=C(2416)Vs[C(3322)]=L[t[C(2380)]]Vs[C(3059)]=C(2080)~=C(3740)Vs[C(2771)]=L[t[C(3059)]]Vs[C(3854)]=Vs[C(2771)](Vs[C(4030)],Vs[C(3758)])Vs[C(2704)]=C(4157)Vs[C(2745)]=Vs[C(3322)][Vs[C(3854)]]Vs[C(3854)]=L[t[C(2380)]]Vs[C(3322)],Vs[C(3343)]=C(2436)>C(2454),C(1 7]=g7;[F7]=E7;[p7]=Q7,[R7]=w7;[G7]=a7;[q7]=j7,[K7]=h7,[S7]=W7;[o7]=M7,[d7]=i7;[I7]=l7;[b7]=x7;[Y7]=m7,[N7]=us;[c7]=J7,[Cs]=vs;[Hs]=ks,[ts]=Ds,[ns]=ys,[Ls]=As;[Os]=zs,[Vs[C(2380)]]=Vs[C(3059)],[Vs[C(2745)]]=Vs[C(3322)];[Vs[C(2771)]]=Vs[C(3854)];[Vs[C(4030)]]=Vs[C(3758)],[Vs[C(2303)]]=Vs[C(3309)],[Vs[C(3847)]]=Vs[C(1791)],[Vs[C(2870)]]=Vs[C(3342)];[Vs[C(2265)]]=Vs[C(3578)],[Vs[C(3350)]]=Vs[C(3716)];[Vs[C(3657)]]=Vs[C(3445)],[Vs[C(3527)]]=Vs[C(3226)];[Vs[C(1339)]]=Vs[C(3880)];[Vs[C(1439)]]=Vs[C(3455)];[Vs[C(1790)]]=Vs[C(1550)],[Vs[C(1979)]]=Vs[C(1384)];[Vs[C(1333)]]=Vs[C(3881)];[Vs[C(4224)]]=Vs[C(2113)],[Vs[C(1591)]]=Vs[C(2104)];[Vs[C(2117)]]=Vs[C(2889)];[Vs[C(1688)]]=Vs[C(1865)],[Vs[C(3402)]]=Vs[C(4013)],[Vs[C(2635)]]=Vs[C(3733)],[Vs[C(2012)]]=Vs[C(1761)];[Vs[C(3764)]]=Vs[C(2188)];[Vs[C(3012)]]=Vs[C(2521)];[Vs[C(3210)]]=Vs[C(2255)];[Vs[C(3625)]]=Vs[C(4127)],[Vs[C(2233)]]=Vs[C(3165)],[Vs[C(2398)]]=Vs[C(1835)],[Vs[C(3492)]]=Vs[C(2726)];[Vs[C(3473)]]=Vs[C(2894)],[Vs[C(2633)]]=Vs[C(4137)];[Vs[C(1426)]]=Vs[C(4163)],[Vs[C(3334)]]=Vs[C(1505)];[Vs[C(3343)]]=Vs[C(1406)];[Vs[C(3779)]]=Vs[C(3734)];[Vs[C(1576)]]=Vs[C(4096)],[Vs[C(3205)]]=Vs[C(2096)];[Vs[C(2406)]]=Vs[C(3823)];[Vs[C(2055)]]=Vs[C(1531)],[Vs[C(2931)]]=Vs[C(1509)];[Vs[C(1445)]]=Vs[C(3659)],[Vs[C(3424)]]=Vs[C(2704)];[Vs[C(3102)]]=Vs[C(3730)],[Vs[C(2658)]]=Vs[C(2476)],[Vs[C(3828)]]=Vs[C(2205)],[Vs[C(2892)]]=Vs[C(3624)],[Vs[C(2287)]]=Vs[C(2266)];[Vs[C(3548)]]=Vs[C(2512)];[Vs[C(1933)]]=Vs[C(3677)];[Vs[C(4017)]]=Vs[C(3742)],[Vs[C(3394)]]=Vs[C(2731)],[Vs[C(1968)]]=Vs[C(3789)],[Vs[C(2786)]]=Vs[C(3084)];[Vs[C(2779)]]=Vs[C(4021)],[Vs[C(3912)]]=Vs[C(1486)],[Vs[C(2528)]]=Vs[C(4088)];[Vs[C(1779)]]=Vs[C(2306)],[Vs[C(3299)]]=Vs[C(3636)],[Vs[C(3214)]]=Vs[C(1687)],[Vs[C(1502)]]=Vs[C(2909)],[Vs[C(4259)]]=Vs[C(1999)],[Vs[C(1446)]]=Vs[C(3177)],[Vs[C(3824)]]=Vs[C(1855)],[Vs[C(4203)]]=Vs[C(3913)];[Vs[C(3725)]]=Vs[C(3267)];[Vs[C(1963)]]=Vs[C(4102)],[Vs[C(2324)]]=Vs[C(3707)],[Vs[C(2572)]]=Vs[C(3180)];[Vs[C(1996)]]=Vs[C(3651)];[Vs[C(1566)]]= p,g=C(2302),nil s=E==p v=s and C(1766)or C(3304)elseif v<C(4232)then B7=C(2835)k7=L[s]V7=L[z]O7=L[B]U7=C(3591)z7=O7(B7,U7)v=C(2123)A7=V7[z7]L7=k7(A7)else v=K7 v=R7 and C(3974)or C(3015)end end end H7=C(1953)v7=u[H7]y7,L7=C(3306),C(2982)t7=L[z]D7=L[B]n7=D7(y7,L7)y7,H7=C(2640),C(1764)k7=t7[n7]H7=v7[H7]H7=H7(v7,k7)k7=L[z]n7=C(3203)t7=L[B]z7=C(1359)D7=t7(n7,y7)v7=k7[D7]t7,O7=C(3029),C(2693)k7=u[t7]L7=L[z]A7=L[B]V7=A7(O7,z7)y7=L7[V7]O7=C(2918)n7=H7[y7]z7=C(2153)L7=L[z]A7=L[B]V7=A7(O7,z7)y7=L7[V7]L7={k7(n7,H7,v7,y7)}D7=L7[C(3059)]t7=L7[C(2380)]n7,k7=v,t7 v=t7 and C(1653)or C(2535)else Y=L[t[C(2380)]]N,J,H7=C(2159),C(3230),C(1983)l=L[t[C(3059)]]k7=C(4101)m=l(J,N)u7=Y[m]x=d[u7]c=L[t[C(2380)]]l=v R,a,y=C(4027),F,C(4130)v=u[y]w=u[R]S=C(2908)q=L[t[C(2380)]]h=C(3617)G=L[t[C(3059)]]K=C(1676)j=G(S,h)o,h,I=C(3980),C(2392),C(3505)R=q[j]Q=w[R]G=L[t[C(2380)]]j=L[t[C(3059)]]S=j(h,K)q=G[S]h=L[t[C(2380)]]K=L[t[C(3059)]]i=C(1662)W=K(i,o)d=C(3417)S=h[W]W=L[t[C(2380)]]i=L[t[C(3059)]]o=i(I,d)K=W[o]h=s..K j=S..h G=a..j S=C(3034)R=q..G a,j=nil,C(3049)G=j-S j=C(3858)q=G-j w={Q(R,q)}y=v(H(w))v=C(3590)elseif C(3156)>v then m=C(1388)b=L[t[C(2745)]]J=C(3436)u7=L[t[C(2380)]]Y=L[t[C(3059)]]l=Y(m,J)x=u7[l]M=b[x]I,v=M,C(4126)else v={}A=v V=L[t[C(2303)]]B,z=V,C(2380)V=C(2380)X=V V=C(2302)s=X<V V,v=z-X,C(3208)end else if C(1824)>v then L7,X7,O7=C(3029),C(4097),C(1953)k7=u[L7]Z7=C(1461)V7=u[O7]z7=L[z]B7=L[B]U7=B7(Z7,X7)O7=z7[U7]A7=V7[O7]O7=C(1953)V7=u[O7]L7=k7(A7,V7)v=L7 and C(3010)or C(2123)elseif C(3924)>v then C(3754)else R7,v=h7,S7 v=C(3765)end end end end end end end end end v=#D return H(y)end,function(u)A[u]=A[u]-C(2380)if A[u]==C(2302)then A[u],L[u]=nil,nil end end,function(u,C)local H=V(C)local
